pr.title: #1 on leaderboard: val_bpb=1.1574 — Int6 + MLP 3x + selective precision + optimized long-context training

output.summary: Int6 post-training quantization with fp16 selective precision and a tripled MLP width powers 2048-window training and stride-256 sliding-window eval within 16MB.
techniques: Int6 per-row quantization with fp16 tied embedding and late-layer key passthrough
Tripled MLP hidden dimension using freed artifact budget
